info.english_meaning: to shineto appearto become evident to glow

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sarvendriyaguRABAsaM sarvendriyavivarjitam' (SvetA0 u0 317) ABAsaH pratItiH hetvABAsaH hetuvadABAsate pratiBAti iti hetvABAso duzwo hetuH
'anudBAsi vAso vasIta' (Apa0 Da0 13012) udBAsi ulbaRam vinItavezaH syAdityarTaH
